gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards at the entrance, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; furthermore, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact.
At the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; in addition, dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, where healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and students clutch resumes inside branded folders.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; furthermore, students clutch resumes inside branded folders, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, while healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; moreover, alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact, while a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor, and consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables while tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps; additionally, healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos.

Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, clutching resumes inside branded folders, while alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards, and a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
summary_sentences: Students line up outside the university gym before the career fair opens, and dozens of booths with colorful banners circle the polished floor; students clutch resumes inside branded folders, while consulting firms stack glossy case study booklets on high tables, and career counselors remind attendees to maintain eye contact; additionally, tech companies display demo screens showing their latest apps, and healthcare providers showcase community outreach photos, and alumni volunteers share quick pep talks near the coffee station; at the entrance, event staff scan registrations and hand out lanyards; furthermore, a welcome announcement outlines the fair schedule over the PA system.

gt_facts: The university gym hosts the annual career fair filled with company booths.
Students carry resumes and practice elevator pitches before approaching recruiters.
Career counselors and alumni offer quick advice near the entrance.
Announcements share the schedule for panels and workshops throughout the day.
Energy stays high as students discuss internships and job opportunities with recruiters.
